name: Tofu "Egg" Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu; drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the crumbled tofu in a bowl.
2. Mash the tofu with a potato masher until it reaches your desired consistency.
3. Add the fat-free mayonnaise, if using, prepared mustard, soy sauce, and turmeric to the mashed tofu.
4. Mix well until the tofu takes on a bright yellow color.
5. Stir in the chopped scallions, minced celery, and pickle relish, if desired.
6. Serve as a spread on bread or stuffed into pita bread.
NOTE: Weight Watchers makes a mayonnaise that is fat-free -- no oil, no eggs.
